title: JuxtUI
description: JuxtOpposed's Redesign of the Minecraft UI
body:
## JuxtUI

**JuxtUI** is a client-side mod that brings Juxtopposed’s vision of a modern Minecraft interface into the game. It redesigns the main menus, screens, and in-game HUD to create a cleaner, more intuitive user experience while preserving vanilla functionality.

The mod is designed to make Minecraft’s interface feel more natural and easier to use. JuxtUI is built to function reliably alongside other mods.

JuxtUI is under active development, with ongoing improvements planned for additional screens and interface elements.

If you encounter bugs or compatibility issues, you can use this [bug tracker](https://bugs.juxtui.com/) or contact me directly on Discord: **@t_echy**
